game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Layton : l'étrange village HD:** Players control Professor Layton and his apprentice Luke in a point-and-click adventure, navigating static 2D scenes by tapping directional arrows to move between locations and tapping on objects or characters to interact. The primary mechanic involves discovering over 100 logic puzzles by tapping on suspicious environmental hotspots or engaging in dialogue with the village's 30+ eccentric inhabitants, each puzzle presenting a unique challenge like sliding blocks, matchstick rearrangements, or riddles. Upon encountering a puzzle, players are presented with a dedicated interface where they input their solution (e.g., dragging pieces, typing numbers); if stuck, "Hint Coins" (found by tapping random spots in the environment, up to 10 per scene) can be spent to reveal up to 3 progressive hints. Solving puzzles advances the main narrative, unlocking new areas of the village and story segments, while optional mini-games involve collecting "trinkets" from solved puzzles to assemble a robot dog, or furniture to decorate a room, offering additional challenges. The game is won by successfully solving all mandatory puzzles and uncovering the mystery of the Golden Apple, with no explicit loss condition, though failing to solve a puzzle prevents story progression until it is either solved or skipped using a sufficient number of Hint Coins.
game_info.description: Embark on a mystery adventure as Professor Layton! Navigate through a mysterious village, discover hidden puzzles, and interact with eccentric villagers. Solve logic puzzles to progress through the story and uncover the secret of the Golden Apple. Collect Hint Coins to help you when puzzles get tricky. Complete all mandatory puzzles to win!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between locations and move cursor in puzzle interface
Space: Interact with objects, NPCs, and confirm puzzle solutions
Z: Use a Hint Coin (when in puzzle mode)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart game

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and interaction test. This validates that the player can navigate between scenes, interact with objects, and enter puzzle interfaces correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move through available locations using arrow keys, interact with at least one object or NPC, and attempt to enter a puzzle. Verify that scene transitions work and interaction mechanics respond properly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test successfully navigates to at least 2 different locations, interacts with at least one hotspot, and enters a puzzle interface. All movements and interactions register correctly without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test. This validates the complete game flow from start to win by solving all mandatory puzzles and progressing through the story.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Systematically solve all mandatory puzzles using optimal solutions. Navigate through all locations, interact with key NPCs to unlock story progression, and collect hint coins as needed. Focus on efficient puzzle solving to reach the final win condition.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: All mandatory puzzles are solved, the story progresses to completion, and the game reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state displaying the victory message about uncovering the Golden Apple mystery.

TEST_3.test_description: Hint coin collection and usage test. Validates that hint coins can be found in the environment and used to help solve puzzles.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Explore scenes thoroughly to find hint coin hotspots. Collect coins by interacting with them. Enter a puzzle and use the Z key to spend hint coins for hints. Verify coin count updates correctly.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Successfully collect at least 5 hint coins from different locations. Use hints in a puzzle and confirm the hint system reveals progressive clues while decrementing the coin count appropriately.
